query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS skill_taxonomy (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  parentId INT,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  code VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  description TEXT,
  domain ENUM('creative', 'technical', 'financial', 'legal', 'operational', 'educational', 'health', 'property', 'leadership', 'interpersonal') NOT NULL,
  technologyTrend ENUM('emerging', 'growing', 'stable', 'declining', 'legacy') DEFAULT 'stable' NOT NULL,
  relevanceScore INT DEFAULT 50 NOT NULL,
  lastTrendUpdate TIMESTAMP,
  externalStandardId VARCHAR(100),
  externalStandardName VARCHAR(255),
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS worker_skills (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  progressionId INT NOT NULL,
  skillId INT NOT NULL,
  proficiencyLevel ENUM('novice', 'beginner', 'intermediate', 'advanced', 'master') DEFAULT 'novice' NOT NULL,
  selfAssessedLevel ENUM('novice', 'beginner', 'intermediate', 'advanced', 'master'),
  verifiedLevel ENUM('novice', 'beginner', 'intermediate', 'advanced', 'master'),
  verifiedBy INT,
  verifiedAt TIMESTAMP,
  yearsExperience DECIMAL(4,1) DEFAULT 0.0,
  projectCount INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  currentlyLearning BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  targetLevel ENUM('novice', 'beginner', 'intermediate', 'advanced', 'master'),
  aiRecommendedPriority INT,
  aiRecommendationReason TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS learning_pathways (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  code VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  description TEXT,
  targetStage ENUM('senior_employee', 'contractor', 'certified_contractor', 'business_owner', 'house_member') NOT NULL,
  targetDepartment VARCHAR(50),
  targetCertification INT,
  steps JSON,
  estimatedDurationWeeks INT,
  aiGenerated BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  aiGeneratedAt TIMESTAMP,
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS progression_events (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  progressionId INT NOT NULL,
  eventType ENUM('stage_change', 'milestone_completed', 'certification_earned', 'certification_expired', 'badge_earned', 'badge_expired', 'skill_verified', 'quality_score_recorded', 'mentor_assigned', 'pathway_started', 'pathway_completed', 'business_formed', 'house_joined') NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  previousValue VARCHAR(255),
  newValue VARCHAR(255),
  metadata JSON,
  triggeredBy INT,
  triggeredBySystem BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  blockchainHash VARCHAR(255),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
